name: GitHub Gist Creator
description: Search GitHub repositories and create Gists. Requires GitHub account authorization.
author: ChatBridge

tools.name: search_repos
tools.description: Search GitHub repositories by keyword. Use when the user wants to find repos or code.

query.description: Search query (e.g., 'react state management', 'python web framework')

tools.name: create_gist
tools.description: Create a GitHub Gist with code or text. Requires GitHub authorization.

tools.name: get_auth_status
tools.description: Check if the user has authorized their GitHub account.
